## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` clean (when CI lands)
- [ ] hassfest passes
- [ ] HACS validation passes
- [ ] Manifest fields up to date (version, requirements, codeowners)
- [ ] Strings + translations in sync
- [ ] If touching entities: device_class + state_class + unique_id reviewed
